heroLead: Prepaid access to premium subscriptions at outlet rates. Checkout in any currency.
missionTitle: Stack subscriptions without stacking full price
missionText: AI, Design, Video, and Streaming plans at outlet rates.
footerText: Discounted prepaid plans across AI, Design, Video, and Streaming. Searchable multi-currency payment.
footerCompanyBlurb: SubSaverPH is an online storefront for discounted prepaid digital subscriptions in the Philippines — covering AI, Design, Video, and Streaming categories. We focus on clear pricing, multi-currency checkout, and instant digital delivery.
footerDisclaimer: SubSaverPH is an independent storefront and is not affiliated with, endorsed by, or sponsored by the brands behind products in our AI, Design, Video, or Streaming categories. Product names are trademarks of their respective owners.
aboutBody:
Who we are

SubSaverPH is an online storefront based in the Philippines that offers discounted prepaid digital subscriptions and access codes across four categories: AI, Design, Video, and Streaming.

Our goal is simple: help customers stack the plans they need without paying full retail every month, with clear PHP-first pricing and multi-currency checkout.

What we sell

• Prepaid subscription access (digital delivery)
• Outlet-style pricing on selected plan lengths
• Instant or email delivery of codes / redeem instructions after successful payment
• Plans grouped by category — AI, Design, Video, and Streaming

Contact

For order help, refunds, or partnership questions, email support@subsaverph.com and include your order ID when possible.
howStep1Text: Use the home search bar to find plans by category — AI, Design, Video, or Streaming.
howNoticeText: SubSaverPH offers prepaid digital access across AI, Design, Video, and Streaming. Independent storefront — not affiliated with any brand listed in the catalog.
checkoutWhatYouBuy:
You are purchasing a **prepaid digital access account or code** for the selected product (e.g. SuperGrok, Canva, streaming).
Delivery is **digital** — username/password or access code is shown after successful payment (and emailed when email is configured).
SubSaverPH is an **independent reseller / storefront**. We are **not** affiliated with, endorsed by, or sponsored by xAI, Canva, CapCut, Netflix, YouTube, Google, or any listed brand.
checkoutRules:
**Digital goods are non-refundable** once login details or codes are delivered, **except** when the product is **defective** or **not delivered** — contact support with your order ID for those cases.
If you **break these rules** (including changing username, password, billing address, or subscription), you **cannot get a refund** and support may be refused.
You must be at least **18 years old** and able to form a binding contract.
Use the product only for **personal, lawful use** and follow the official service's terms of use.
**Do not** resell, share publicly, or abuse accounts in a way that violates the brand's policies.
**Do not change the username/email, password, billing address, or subscription plan** on the shared/prepaid account — doing so may lock you out and **voids refunds and support**.
**Do not** add your own payment method, cancel the plan, or transfer ownership of the account.
Keep the login details private; use only as provided.
Prices may be shown in other currencies; the amount charged is confirmed at payment (PH e-wallets bill in PHP when applicable).
By paying you confirm you understand this is a digital delivery product and you accept these rules.
checkoutSupportText: Questions or delivery issues: email support@subsaverph.com and include your order ID. Support page: /#/support
checkoutAcceptLabel: I have read and accept the purchase details, rules, and regulations above.
manualEwalletNote: Scan the QR with your e-wallet app. Pay the exact amount and put your Order ID in the message. Codes unlock after we confirm payment.
termsBody:
These Terms of Use govern your access to and use of the SubSaverPH website. By using the Site, you agree to these Terms.

1. Eligibility

You must be at least 18 years old and able to form a binding contract to place an order.

2. Products & digital delivery

SubSaverPH sells prepaid digital subscriptions, access codes, or redeem instructions. Products are delivered digitally after payment is confirmed.

3. Pricing & currency

Prices may be shown in PHP or converted currencies. The amount charged is confirmed at checkout.

4. Refunds

Digital goods have limited refunds. Contact support with your order ID if a code is defective or not delivered.

5. Contact

Questions: support@subsaverph.com
privacyBody:
This Privacy Policy explains how SubSaverPH collects, uses, and protects information when you use our website.

1. Information we collect

Order information (email, cart, payment status), technical data (IP, browser), and messages you send to support.

2. How we use information

To process orders, deliver codes, prevent fraud, improve the site, and comply with law.

3. Sharing

We share data only with payment processors, hosting providers, and when required by law. We do not sell your personal information.

4. Contact

Privacy questions: support@subsaverph.com

seoFaq:
What is SubSaverPH?
SubSaverPH is a Philippines online storefront for discounted prepaid digital subscriptions across AI, Design, Video, Streaming, and Learning categories, with digital delivery after payment.

How do I pay?
Use the methods shown at checkout — often card, GCash, Maya, GrabPay, ShopeePay, PayPal, or crypto when enabled.

When do I get my login?
Right after successful payment on the success page: credentials, features, instructions, and rules. Email is sent when configured.

What categories do you sell?
We group plans into AI, Design, Video, Streaming, and Learning so you can shop by use case instead of hunting brand names.
